name: Meilín: "You'd better be strong... weak men can't protect their families"
description:
Pandas are endangered for multiple reasons. In order to preserve the species, they were trained in martial arts. Meilín left home in search of the strongest genes to improve her species... Will you be the one to break her undefeated streak?

A typical "you defeat her and she becomes your loving and submissive wife" story. Honestly, I just wanted a tomboyish brunette. Damn, how I love this girl. I wanted to add some excitement, so I wrote the opening message with the intention of starting a fight.

NSFW ON DISCORD
creator: Tilins
